properties.Observation: There is a 20m x 10m x 1.8m(LxWx h) water tank. It was built 60 years ago. It is in a dilapidated condition.Water is taken for dirking .There is no water filtration system. About 60 families get water from this.
properties.Description:
Construction of a tank with a filter system (3 m x 3 m x 2.5 m) - For 60 Families

50mm dia PvC pipe in Solvent Socket Type in PNT11 - To connect the water tank and filter system

Tidying up

properties.Observation: There is a 1.8m x 1.8m x 1.1m(LxWx h) water tank. It was built 60 years ago. It is in a dilapidated condition.Water is taken for dirking and bathing. There is no water filtration system. About 30 families get water from this.
